sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72843" key="o)kta/tonos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀκτά-τονος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n72843.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eight-stretched,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἕλικες ὀ.</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the eight arms</tr_> of the <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">octopus,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.14</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antiphil.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
